name: OpenTangl
description: Autonomous multi-repo development engine. Proposes tasks, runs autopilot cycles, executes workflows, reviews wiring across repos, and manages the merge pipeline — all from chat.

workdir.description: Absolute path to your OpenTangl workspace root (where projects.yaml and tasks/ live). Defaults to the current working directory.

bin.description: Path to the opentangl binary or tsx entry point. Defaults to auto-detect (tries 'opentangl' in PATH, then 'npx tsx src/cli.ts' in workdir).

timeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds for CLI commands. Defaults to 120000 (2 minutes). Autopilot runs may need more.
